tweets.content:
拿比特币称为数字黄金，也有点问题

黄金用途里，首饰+工业占比超过 55%，尤其中国印度

黄金用途是消费+投资+储备+工业，消费和工业比特币不具备（可惜了 NFT）

比特币比黄金优势是自托管、瞬间全球转移、不依赖第三方可验证、上限写死、可编程

比特币未来这么说更好: 比如虚拟世界的终极资产？

tweets.name: Uniswap Labs 🦄
tweets.content:
We created a way to chain any onchain action together. Launched with bridge + swap (aka crosschain swap). But soon you can imagine chaining anything:

• unwind LP position + swap
• swap + bid into a token auction
• fiat onramp + swap (aka onramp onto any token)
• swap + earn…

tweets.name: Uniswap Labs 🦄
tweets.content:
just shipped chained actions on @Uniswap

crosschain swapping is the first use case

a composable state machine that breaks any multi-step swap into a plan of atomic operations, self-custodial at every step

we didn't hack this on top of something else, we went back to first…

tweets.name: Uniswap Labs 🦄
tweets.content:
Crosschain swaps on Uniswap apps work the way you'd expect them to

Like any other swap

(That's the point)

tweets.content:
$TAO 子网很早在玩，现在完全对买子网提不起兴趣。买来买去发现还不如买 $TAO 来得收益高。一是 $TAO 子网高通胀，二是 $TAO 子网流动性不足，买不了很多，主要还是在追求高风险高收益。

流动性在注意力上来之后会好很多。不过，注意力来得快去得也快，注意力散去后又是一地鸡毛。
